title: Token $Marketing ain't just hype—backed by real $ETH rewards. If you're building on Base and want to

audit.reason: The provided test contract is incomplete and lacks essential test cases to ensure the correctness of the TokenMarketingBounty contract. Additionally, the test contract does not properly set up the rewardToken or other necessary variables for testing.
audit.improvements: Complete the test contract by setting up the rewardToken and writing comprehensive test cases to verify the functionality of the claim and withdrawRemainingRewards methods. Ensure that edge cases, such as attempting to claim when there are no rewards left or withdrawing rewards when none are available, are also tested.
